_comment: Golden-synthetic NormalizedTranscriptionResult for phrase_alpha.wav simulating a Whisper adapter run (segment-level timings split proportionally by character count; authoritative=false). Generated deterministically from the oracle with +/- 15-30 ms per-boundary jitter that mimics the drift introduced by char-proportional splitting on a multi-word segment. Stays under the p95<=40 ms gate; a regression in the split logic (e.g. synthesizing equal durations) would blow this past 40 ms and fail G2.
